attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
	 SBC.PNR_LOCATOR3 as BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID
	,SBC.GDS_CODE3 as BK_AMEX_GDS_CD
	,SBC.CUSTOMER_ID3  as BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID
	,SBC.PAX_SEQUENCE3  as BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT
	,SBC.CAR_SEQUENCE as BK_RENTAL_CAR_SEQ_NUM_INT
	,COALESCE(NACRC.BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD,SBC.CHAIN0,'-9') as BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD  /* Added SBC.CHAIN0 in R10  */
	,COALESCE(cast(SBC.PICKUP_DATE as DATE),cast('1900-01-01' as date) ) as RENTAL_CAR_PICKUP_DT	
	,SBC.ORIGINAL_AMOUNT0 as RENTAL_CAR_LOCAL_RT_AMT
	,SBC.CONVERTED_AMOUNT1 as RENTAL_CAR_REPORTING_RT_AMT 
	,SBC.NUMBER_CARS as  RENTAL_CAR_CNT  
	,cast( SBC.DROPOFF_DATE as date )   as RENTAL_CAR_DROP_OFF_DT 
	,SBC.STATE0 as  RENTAL_CAR_STATE_CD  
	,COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE ,cast( trim(SBC.COUNTRY0) as CHAR(3)) ,'UNK') as RENTAL_CAR_COUNTRY_CD /* Added SBC.COUNTRY0 in R10 */ 
	,COALESCE( NARCT.BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD,SBC.CAR_TYPE,'UNK' )  as BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD  /* Added SBC.CAR_TYPE in R10 */
    ,COALESCE ( NISOOC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE ,'UNK' )  as LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD
	,COALESCE ( NISOCC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE ,'UNK' )  as  REPORTING_CURRENCY_CD
    	/* New columns in R10 */  
		,BOOKING_DATE1 as  RENTAL_CAR_BOOKING_DT         
		,COALESCE( BOOKING_STATUS0,'=')  as RENTAL_CAR_BOOKING_STATUS_CD
        ,COALESCE(SBC.CITY0 ,'UNKNOWN')  as RENTAL_CAR_CITY_NAME /* Old column*/        
		,COALESCE(CITY_CODE0 ,'=') as  RENTAL_CAR_CITY_CD            
		,CONFIRMATION0 as RENTAL_CAR_CONFIRMATION_NUM   
		,COALESCE(DOM_INTL0  ,'=') as RENTAL_CAR_DOMESTC_INTRNTNL_CD
		,PICKUP_LOCATION as RENTAL_CAR_PICKUP_LOCATION_CD
        ,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
        ,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM   
(
	SELECT 
			PNR_LOCATOR3,
			GDS_CODE3,
			CUSTOMER_ID3,
			PAX_SEQUENCE3,
			CAR_SEQUENCE,
			PICKUP_DATE,
			ORIGINAL_AMOUNT0,
			CONVERTED_AMOUNT1,
			NUMBER_CARS,
			DROPOFF_DATE,
			CITY0,
			STATE0,
			CHAIN0,
			COUNTRY0,
			CAR_TYPE,
			ORIGINAL_CURRENCY1,
			CONVERTED_CURRENCY1,
			BOOKING_DATE1,
			BOOKING_STATUS0,
			CITY_CODE0,
			CONFIRMATION0 ,
			DOM_INTL0,
			PICKUP_LOCATION
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_BOOKED_CAR  
 )SBC
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_CAR_RENTAL_COMPANY  NACRC 
	ON SBC.CHAIN0 = NACRC.BK_RENTAL_COMPANY_CD   
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOC
	ON  SBC.COUNTRY0= ETCISOC. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE     
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
	on ETCISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE    
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE  NARCT
	ON SBC.CAR_TYPE = NARCT.BK_RENTAL_CAR_TYPE_CD      
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NISOOC
	ON  NISOOC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  = SBC.ORIGINAL_CURRENCY1     
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY  NISOCC
	ON NISOCC. BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE  = SBC.CONVERTED_CURRENCY1  
Inner Join $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING  NATB  
	ON   (	NATB.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID           =  SBC.PNR_LOCATOR3
		and NATB.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD       =          SBC.GDS_CODE3
		and NATB.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID           = SBC.CUSTOMER_ID3
		and NATB.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT =SBC.PAX_SEQUENCE3 )

SELECT 
BATCH_ID,                      
XPK_ROW3  ,                    
FK_TRAVEL3 ,                   
CONFIRMATION0   ,              
CAR_TYPE   ,                   
PAX_SEQUENCE3      ,           
BOOKING_STATUS0  ,             
CONVERTED_CURRENCY1 ,          
ORIGINAL_AMOUNT0    ,          
COUNTRY0 ,                     
DOM_INTL0   ,                  
PNR_LOCATOR3  ,                
CUSTOMER_ID3,                  
CONVERTED_AMOUNT1    ,         
CHAIN0    ,                    
BOOKING_DATE1   ,              
CITY0   ,                      
ORIGINAL_CURRENCY1    ,        
NUMBER_CARS ,                  
PICKUP_DATE,                   
GDS_CODE3 ,                    
STATE0   ,                     
CAR_SEQUENCE ,                 
DROPOFF_DATE  ,                
REASON_CODE0   ,               
BOOKING_TYPE0   ,              
PICKUP_LOCATION   ,            
CITY_CODE0     ,               
CREATE_DATETIME,               
ACTION_CODE  ,                 
'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE  
FROM $$STGDB.ST_BOOKED_CAR SBC
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS
           (  SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_BOOKING  NATB  
	WHERE   NATB.BK_AMEX_PNR_LOCATOR_ID                 =  SBC.PNR_LOCATOR3
		 and NATB.BK_AMEX_GDS_CD                          = SBC.GDS_CODE3
		 and NATB.BK_AMEX_CUSTOMER_ID               = SBC.CUSTOMER_ID3
		and NATB.BK_AMEX_PAX_SEQUENCE_INT      =SBC.PAX_SEQUENCE3 
	        )
